expectations.text: Uses toast() from sonner for notifications
expectations.evidence: Line 15: import { toast } from 'sonner', used with toast.warning() and toast.success()

expectations.text: Toast is called when a menu item/action is selected
expectations.evidence: handleMenuAction calls toast.warning or toast.success based on item type
Uses asChild prop (Radix pattern) on DrawerTrigger (line 69) and DrawerClose (line 100) instead of render prop (Base UI pattern). Also uses lucide-react icons instead of @phosphor-icons/react.
